concepts.title: Idèles and class formations
concepts.blurb: Idèle class groups package global and local arithmetic data in one object.

concepts.title: Artin reciprocity map
concepts.blurb: The Artin map identifies abelianized Galois groups with arithmetic quotient groups.

concepts.title: Local and global class field theory
concepts.blurb: Ray class fields and local reciprocity provide explicit control of abelian extensions.
